criteria.rule: == pass

criteria.name: main.c host syntax check pass
criteria.rule: == pass

criteria.name: local task fixed-point reference generated
criteria.rule: == pass

criteria.name: reference sequence length
reference tail accuracy
reference second-half improves or matches first-half
reference pending gap depth
reference max pending depth
reference native context writes observed
reference native context reads observed
reference native context retained four keyed slots
reference native keyed route writes observed
reference native keyed route reads observed
reference native keyed route retained four slots
reference native route values cover both signs
criteria.rule: contains -1 and 1

reference native keyed memory reads observed
reference native keyed memory retained four slots
reference native memory values cover both signs
criteria.rule: contains -1 and 1

criteria.name: reference native feature source declared
criteria.rule: == chip_decoupled_context_route_memory_lookup_feature_transform

criteria.name: reference final weight positive after native memory-route stream
reference final bias bounded near zero
criteria.rule: abs(raw) <= 32

criteria.name: source CMD_SCHEDULE_PENDING defined
criteria.rule: config.h defines opcode

criteria.name: source CMD_MATURE_PENDING defined
criteria.rule: config.h defines opcode

criteria.name: source learning opcodes host-tested
criteria.rule: host tests cover opcodes

criteria.name: source controller exposes schedule command
criteria.rule: Python host can schedule delayed-credit state on board

criteria.name: source controller exposes mature command
criteria.rule: Python host can mature delayed-credit state on board

criteria.name: source runtime schedule handler exists
criteria.rule: runtime computes prediction and schedules pending horizon

criteria.name: source runtime mature handler exists
criteria.rule: runtime matures pending horizon and updates readout

criteria.name: source learning commands dispatched
criteria.rule: SDP dispatcher routes learning commands

criteria.name: source fixed-point helper is s16.15
criteria.rule: config.h defines the same fixed-point scale as the Python reference

criteria.name: source readout prediction equation present
criteria.rule: runtime prediction must match local parity reference

criteria.name: source readout update equation present
criteria.rule: runtime maturation must match local parity reference
criteria.value: delta_w = lr * error * feature; delta_b = lr * error

criteria.name: source mature command supports explicit mature_timestep
criteria.rule: parity run uses explicit due_timestep to avoid timer-race false failures

criteria.name: source controller exposes returned due_timestep
criteria.rule: hardware parity can mature exactly the pending event it scheduled

criteria.name: source runtime supports hardware profiles
criteria.rule: hardware build must be able to compile only the native primitive handlers required by this tier

criteria.name: source native context, route, memory, and decoupled schedule command constants exist
criteria.rule: custom runtime must expose native context plus independently keyed memory-route state primitives

criteria.name: source native context write/read handlers use bounded C slots
criteria.rule: context state must be owned by the C runtime, not a host-only dictionary

criteria.name: source native keyed route write/read handlers exist
criteria.rule: keyed route state must be owned by the C runtime, not a host-only dictionary

criteria.name: source native keyed memory write/read handlers exist
criteria.rule: memory/working state must be owned by the C runtime, not a host-only dictionary

criteria.name: source native decoupled keyed memory-route schedule forms feature on chip
criteria.rule: host must send independent context/route/memory keys plus cue/delay, while the runtime retrieves all three slots and computes the scalar feature

criteria.name: source task loop can score pre-update predictions
criteria.rule: task micro-loop must evaluate the decision before credit updates the readout

criteria.name: source task loop increments decision counter
criteria.rule: minimal task loop must count decisions separately from rewards

criteria.name: source pending horizons do not store future target
criteria.rule: delayed-credit target must arrive at maturation, not be hidden in the pending record

reference.equation: chip feature=context_slot_lookup(context_key)*route_slot_lookup(route_key)*memory_slot_lookup(memory_key)*visible_cue; schedule prediction=w*feature+bias; keep pending across gap; mature oldest with target; w+=lr*(target-prediction)*feature; b+=lr*(target-prediction)

summary.next_step_if_passed: Prepare cra_422ah and run the Tier 4.22x tiny native decoupled memory-route composition micro-task on EBRAINS.

tier: Tier 4.22x - Compact v2 Bridge Over Native Decoupled State Primitive Custom-Runtime Smoke
